title: OpsGenie Heartbeat
description: Represents a heartbeat monitor that tracks the health and availability of systems and services. When a monitored system fails to send a ping within the configured interval, OpsGenie generates an alert.

name.description: Name of the heartbeat monitor, used as its identifier.

description.description: Description of what the heartbeat monitors.

enabled.description: Whether the heartbeat is currently active.

expired.description: Whether the heartbeat has missed its expected ping window.

lastPingTime.description: Date and time of the last successful ping.

alertMessage.description: Custom message for the alert generated when the heartbeat expires.

alertTags.description: Tags added to the alert generated by an expired heartbeat.

alertPriority.description: Priority of the alert generated by an expired heartbeat.
